facts_en: Designed for quiet, smooth high-speed service.
Retro-futuristic profile used here as a heritage visual variant.
Narrow pointed nose gives it a distinct silhouette.
8-car N700 series used on San'yō Sakura and Mizuho services.
Warm wood-tone interiors in its 2+2 green-style ordinary cars.
Inspection train inspired livery for visual variety.
A rare service used here as a calm special run.
